seo.title: Faizan Khan - AI-Focused Full Stack Developer | Python, Django, React, SQL
seo.description: Portfolio of Faizan Khan, a passionate AI-focused full stack developer with expertise in Python, Django, React, and SQL. Building intelligent and scalable web applications.
seo.keywords: full-stack developer, python developer, django, react developer, SQL, AI developer, web development, REST API, portfolio
seo.author: Faizan Khan

hero.name: Faizan Khan
hero.title: AI-Focused Full Stack Developer | Python, Django, React, SQL
hero.tagline: Building Intelligent and Scalable Web Applications

about.paragraph: Python, Django, and React Web Developer with hands-on experience in web development and REST APIs. Completed a Udemy certification and skilled in data entry, teamwork, and project management. Passionate about Artificial Intelligence (AI) and modern web technologies, always learning and focused on delivering high-quality, scalable solutions.

projects.title: Recipe Recommendation System
projects.summary: AI-based recipe recommendation web app using Django with TF-IDF and cosine similarity for personalized suggestions.
projects.shortDescription: Developed an AI-based recipe recommendation web app using Django with TF-IDF and cosine similarity for personalized suggestions. Added ingredient search, dietary filters, and feedback features with a responsive Bootstrap UI. The system analyzes user preferences and suggests recipes based on available ingredients and dietary requirements.

projects.title: Blog Application
projects.summary: Dynamic blog site with full CRUD operations, user comments, and responsive design.
projects.shortDescription: Developed a dynamic blog site using Python, Django, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Implemented features to create, edit, and delete posts with user comments. Designed a responsive and user-friendly interface and managed data storage using SQLite. Includes authentication system and rich text editor for content creation.

projects.title: Social Media Clone
projects.summary: Full-featured social media web app with authentication, profiles, and real-time interactions.
projects.shortDescription: Built a social media web app using Django with user authentication, profiles, posts, likes, comments, and follows, featuring a mobile-friendly design and SQLite database. Implements real-time notifications, image uploads, and user activity feeds with a modern, intuitive interface.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.summary: Modern portfolio website built with React and TypeScript with 3D animations and responsive design.
projects.shortDescription: Built a personal portfolio website using React and TypeScript, showcasing projects, skills, and contact details with data managed in JSON and a fully responsive design. Features 3D CSS animations, custom components, and mobile-first approach for optimal viewing on all devices.

testimonials.name: John Smith
testimonials.content: Jane delivered exceptional work on our e-commerce platform. Her attention to detail and technical expertise made the project a huge success.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Working with Jane was a pleasure. She transformed our ideas into a beautiful, functional application that exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: Highly skilled developer who brings creativity and professionalism to every project. Would definitely work with her again!

timeline.title: Bachelor in Computer Science
timeline.description: Currently pursuing Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with focus on AI, web development, and modern technologies. Developing expertise in Python, Django, React, and artificial intelligence applications.

timeline.title: Web Development Certification
timeline.description: Completed comprehensive web development certification covering Python, Django, React, and REST APIs. Gained hands-on experience building full-stack applications.

timeline.title: Web 5 Fundamentals - A New Evolution of Web Data Ownership
timeline.description: Studied the next generation of web technologies focusing on decentralized data ownership and user-centric web applications.

timeline.title: Microsoft Office Certification
timeline.description: Completed Microsoft Office certification, enhancing productivity skills and proficiency in professional software tools.
